firefox.name: Firefox
firefox.description: Open-source browser with strong anti-tracking and extension support.

librewolf.name: LibreWolf
librewolf.description: Hardened Firefox fork with telemetry removed and privacy defaults enabled.

brave.name: Brave Browser
brave.description: Privacy browser with built-in ad and tracker blocking.

nextdns.name: NextDNS
nextdns.description: Configurable DNS firewall with tracker and malware blocking.

quad9.name: Quad9 DNS
quad9.description: Security-focused DNS blocking malicious domains automatically.

proton_vpn.name: Proton VPN
proton_vpn.description: No-logs VPN with strong encryption and Swiss jurisdiction.

mullvad.name: Mullvad VPN
mullvad.description: Anonymous VPN with no account required.

wireguard.name: WireGuard
wireguard.description: Fast, modern VPN protocol used by many privacy services.

simplewall.name: simplewall
simplewall.description: Lightweight Windows firewall control using Windows Filtering Platform.

portmaster.name: Portmaster
portmaster.description: Full network monitoring and per-app firewall with DNS control.

windows_defender.name: Microsoft Defender
windows_defender.description: Built-in antivirus with surprisingly strong baseline protection.

malwarebytes.name: Malwarebytes
malwarebytes.description: On-demand malware and adware removal tool.

hitmanpro.name: HitmanPro
hitmanpro.description: Second-opinion scanner for advanced malware detection.

oos.name: O&O ShutUp10++
oos.description: Disables Windows telemetry and privacy-invasive settings.

wintoys.name: Wintoys
wintoys.description: System tuning and cleanup tool for Windows privacy and performance.

privacy_sexy.name: Privacy.sexy
privacy_sexy.description: Script-based Windows hardening and debloating tool.

winget.name: Windows Package Manager (winget)
winget.description: Official CLI package manager for installing apps securely.

chocolatey.name: Chocolatey
chocolatey.description: Third-party package manager for Windows automation.

scoop.name: Scoop
scoop.description: Minimalist CLI installer focused on developer tools.

veracrypt.name: VeraCrypt
veracrypt.description: Disk encryption tool for full volume and container encryption.

bitwarden.name: Bitwarden
bitwarden.description: Open-source password manager with zero-knowledge encryption.

process_explorer.name: Process Explorer
process_explorer.description: Advanced task manager showing deep system process behavior.

autoruns.name: Autoruns
autoruns.description: View and control all auto-starting programs.

vlc.name: VLC Media Player
vlc.description: Open-source media player supporting nearly all formats.

stremio.name: Stremio
stremio.description: Media aggregation platform for streaming content from multiple sources.

wireshark.name: Wireshark
wireshark.description: Network packet analyzer for traffic inspection.

fiddler.name: Fiddler Classic
fiddler.description: HTTP/HTTPS debugging proxy for traffic inspection.
